messages.content: hello. i'm interested in the Samsung Gear S3 Classic you have for sale.
hi, are you interested in this item?
yes i am is it working 100% like?
absolutely, it has served me well for the past 2 years i've had it, never had an issue.
come on, sorry i was thinking at least 275.0
that's still higher than budget ... would you go for 257.0, including shipping cost?
hi, i am interested in your Panasonic 32" TV
yes, i really need one, what color is it?
does it come with a power cord?
great, i am definitely interested but i would like to offer you 90.0
you can definitely pick it up. 90.0 is reasonable.
i don't think that would be a problem
hi were you interested in the Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating?
he has an upgraded Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating and pays 1200. i understand rent has gone up in the past 2 years, so i am willing to pay 2160.0
i can do 2400.0 and waive the security deposit.
good thanks! i'd love to but this place. what can you tell me about it?
would yo be willing to accept 647.0?
i'm afraid that won't work. 1200.0 is a final offer. sorry.
i think we are not a good match for this $1295 Studio Apt in Richmond -walk-in distance to Bart. sorry. good luck
i am interested in your Used high end printer Dell 2130cn?
yikes! i only have 229.0 cash plus the smart phone?
can we meet in the middle at 239.0?
that's a little low. would you accept 1633.0 this is a steal!
that's because your offer was too low to begin with. 1630.0 do you have a counter offer?
i like your style, what if i give you a coupon book and we call it 1310.0
hello? i'm interested in the lovely Ideal location in Livermore! Will not last! you have rent.
hi, are you in the market for a condo?
that's too bad, i actually have 22 dogs, but i am willing to do 1330.0
how about 1730.0 and free utilites for 6 months?
howdy! are you interested in the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System?
can we meet in the middle at 127.0?
i really like the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System, would you accept 127.0?
i'll do 134.0 for the subs or 275 for both
hi, i'm really interested in these Futon, they're gorgeous!
hi are you interested in this Futon?
hello. yes, can you tell me the height and depth?
there brushed nickel finised and in excellent condition
yes, i am selling the Futon for 125.0
i would like to pay 62.0, please
yes, hello, are these two pieces of furniture in good condition?
would you be willing to take 300.0 for it?
that's a bit low for the worth of the Rosewood Dining Table, 8 chairs, Corner Cabinet. i could do 600.0.
how about 518.0 and i will deliver it to you myself?
hello, how old is your couch?
brand new and never been used
how about 380.0 and free shipping drop-off
how about 500.0. the cast iron handles are immacalate.
that's still more than i would like to pay. right now the most i can do is 380.0.
i can maybe go down to 473.0
463.0 is the lowest i can go
